metaData.Ingredients:
Salted Chilli Pepper, Fermented Soya Bean Paste (Water, Salt, Soya Bean, Wheat), Fermented Broad Bean Paste (Broad Bean, Water, Salt, Wheat), White Sugar, Garlic, Contains Permitted Food Conditioners (Modified Corn Starch, Lactic Acid), Chilli Pepper Powder, Soya Bean Oil, Permitted Flavour Enhancers (Disodium 5'-Inosinate, Disodium 5'-Guanylate)
• Contains Soya Bean, Wheat
metaData.Key Information:
• Sichuan-style chili sauce
• Made from a special blend of chili and fermented broad beans
• Great for dipping or making spicy dishes
metaData.Preparation:
Ma-Po Tofu:
1. Stir-fry 120g (4oz) minced beef/pork for 1/2 min
2. Place on dish
3. Add 1 tbsp Minced garlic and 2 1/2 tbsp Chili Bean Sauce, 350g (12oz) diced beancurd, any choices of meat and 3 tbsp water
4. Cook through
metaData.SAP Product Name: LEE KUM KEE SAUCE - CHILLI BEAN 226G

product.name: Lee Kum Kee Sauce - Chili Bean

metaData.Ingredients:
Vegetable Oil (Palm Olein), Chili Paste [19% (Chili, Water, Dried Chili, Salt)], Onion, Dried Shrimp (12%), Water, Garlic, Shallot, Shrimp Paste [5% (Shrimp, Salt)], Sugar, Candlenut, Lime Juice, Lemon Grass. Galangal, Yeast Extract, Chili Powder Garlic Powder
• The product contains: Crustaceans, tree nuts
• Manufactured on equipment that also processess peanuts, seseame, fish, soybeans, wheat, celery, tree nuts, molluscs and egg products
metaData.Key Information: No artificial colouring, flavouring and preservatives.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Heat 1 teaspoon of cooking oil in wok on medium heat
2. Add Prima Taste pack and stir-fry for 3 seconds
3. Add 180g of kangkong and 1 -2 tablespoons of water and stir-fry for 10 seconds or till desired texture
• Note:
Avoid overcooking the kangkong
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store in cool, dry place
• After opening, keep pack refrigerated and use within 3 days

metaData.Ingredients: Dry Chilli, Salt, Water, Approved Preservative

metaData.Key Information:
• Unique taste
• Enhance dining pleasure anytime
• Taste great with vegetable dishes especially Kang Kong

metaData.Ingredients: Chili Paste (20%) (Chili, Water, Dried Chili, Salt), Vegetable Oil (Palm Olein), Sugar, Onion, Garlic, Shallot, Tomato Paste (5%), Tomato, Candlenut, Shrimp Paste (2,5%) (Shrimp, Salt), lemon Grass, Salt, Tamarind Extract 9Water, Tamarind, Salt, Galangal, Tumeric, Chili Powder, Turmeric Powder
metaData.Key Information: A delicate blend of shrimp, chili, tomato paste and mixed spices.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Stir-fry onion with 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil on medium high heat
2. Add 160g of seafood and stir-fry till almost cooked
3. Add 2 tablespoons of water and Prima Taste Pack, stir-fry until fragrant and seafood is evenly coated
metaData.SAP Product Name: PRIMA TASTE SAUCE - NONYA SAMBAL (SWEET & SPICY CHILLI)
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: Prima Taste Sauce - Nonya Sambal Sweet & Spicy Chili

metaData.Ingredients: Onion, Garlic, Water, Tomato Paste (11%), Palm Oil, Sugar, Salt, Chilli (2.5%), Modified Tapioca Starch, Lemon Grass (2%), Tamarind, Yeast Extract
metaData.Key Information:
• A favourite hot and spicy read-to-cook Malaysian sauce with chilli, tomato paste and lemon grass
• Traditionally cooked with seafood
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Combine 1 pack of Brahim's Sambal Tumis Sauce with 300g prawns or squids and 80ml (1/3 cup) water
2. Cook and stir on medium heat for 8 minutes or until seafood is cooked
3. Serve hot
metaData.Storage Information:
• Once opened keep refrigerated
• Use within 24 hours

metaData.Ingredients: Chilli, Cooking Oil, Onion, Garlic, Sugar, Salt, Spices, Dried Prawn, Permitted Preservative (E202)
metaData.Key Information: A specially prepared Sambal chilli and an appetizing taste to your favourite dishes.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Heat pan, add in Sing Long sambal chili and onion
2. Fry til fragrant
3. Ready to serve with rice
Serve with:
• Onion - 1 piece
• Nasi lemak or steamed rice -1 Plate
• Cucumber (Sliced)
